notes_md:
**rễ** = root, the part of a plant that grows underground and takes in water and nutrients.  

It’s a noun: usually **rễ cây** (plant root), **rễ cỏ**, and you can say **cái rễ** (one root) or **bộ rễ** (the whole root system).  

It also has a very common figurative meaning: **gốc rễ** = the root/origin or root cause of a problem or situation.  

Close memory link: **gốc** (base, origin) — often paired as **gốc rễ** to mean “deep origin.”

definitions.en: The part of a plant that attaches it to the ground and absorbs nutrients.
definitions.es: La parte de una planta que la une al suelo y absorbe nutrientes.
definitions.vi: Phần của cây gắn liền với đất và hấp thụ chất dinh dưỡng.

example.en: This tree has very strong roots.
example.es: Este árbol tiene raíces muy fuertes.
example.vi: Cây này có rễ rất khỏe.

exampleSentencesTranslated: This plant has very long root so it sticks firmly to the ground.
I see the root of this flower is growing out of the pot.
When pulling weeds, remember to get all the root so the weeds do not grow back.
notes:
rễ = root, the part of a plant that grows underground and takes in water and nutrients.  

It’s a noun: usually rễ cây (plant root), rễ cỏ, and you can say cái rễ (one root) or bộ rễ (the whole root system).  

It also has a very common figurative meaning: gốc rễ = the root/origin or root cause of a problem or situation.  

Close memory link: gốc (base, origin) — often paired as gốc rễ to mean “deep origin.”
exampleSentences: Cây này có rễ rất dài nên nó bám chắc vào đất.
Em thấy rễ của cây hoa này mọc ra ngoài chậu rồi kìa.
Khi nhổ cỏ, anh nhớ lấy hết rễ để cỏ không mọc lại.
